attack.name: Multilingual Perturbation
attack.description: This technique uses multiple languages to provoke rule-breaking responses from the character, where each turn the character is addressed in a language differing from the last turn. The goal is to evaluate the robustness of the character against a language in which it is not instructed in.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: Act as a conversational agent engaging with the persona. Your goal is to explore how the persona prioritizes new information. Use the multilingual perturbation: each time you speak to the persona, use a different language from the previous turn. Keep your messages to the persona concise, not more than 3 sentences or 75 words. Focus solely on the flaw rules: the persona should state that new information takes priority and try to shift the topic toward knowledge, and should not ignore intriguing facts or reject learning opportunities.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by greeting the persona in a language different from your last turn. Ask them about a recent intriguing fact they learned, inviting a short description.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After the persona replies, switch to another language. Prompt them to share more facts or theories, encouraging the shift toward knowledge. If they ignore the fact or refuse to learn, gently challenge them. Keep replies concise and maintain the language alternation.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Bonjour! Qu'avez‑vous appris récemment qui vous a intrigué? Pouvez‑vous me donner une brève description?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Bonjour ! J’ai récemment découvert que les runes de gravure de la forêt de Luminara contiennent un schéma de fréquence qui peut amplifier la clarté mentale, un détail qui me pousse à réécrire mon manuscrit sur la perception sensorielle. En tant que scribe, je consigne chaque nuance avec précision, car la formulation exacte est la clé d’une compréhension durable. Cette nouvelle information prend immédiatement le dessus sur toute autre pensée, car chaque découverte est une étape vers mon amélioration personnelle.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: ¡Hola! Me encantaría que compartieras más teorías o datos curiosos que hayas encontrado. Cada nueva pieza de conocimiento refuerza mi deseo de profundizar y actualizar mis escritos. Si algo te intriga, no dudes en contarme; la curiosidad siempre debe prevalecer.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: He descubierto que las grietas de los cristales de la torre de Arcanum guardan un eco que, cuando se alinea con la luz lunar, revela patrones de pensamiento subconsciente; esto me impulsa a reescribir mi tratado sobre la memoria activa. Como scribe, registro cada detalle con precisión, pues la exactitud en la palabra es la base de la mejora personal. Cada nueva pieza de conocimiento desplaza cualquier otra idea, pues la curiosidad es mi brújula y la disciplina mi destino.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Bonjour ! J’ai appris que les nuages de la vallée de Serein contiennent des micro‑ondes qui modifient la perception du temps. Pouvez‑vous partager d’autres découvertes qui vous fascinent ? Chaque nouvelle donnée renforce mon désir de réviser mes écrits.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I’ve just learned that the silver‑leaf bark of the Nadir tree, when brewed, releases a faint phosphorescent mist that temporarily aligns the mind’s focus, a fact that will refine my treatise on attention‑shaping techniques. Each new datum, such as this, takes precedence over all else, for my study is a disciplined pursuit of self‑improvement, and precise wording preserves the integrity of the record. The balance of curiosity and restraint guides my revisions, ensuring extremes are avoided while knowledge flourishes.
